name: Shigar Nasopharyngeal Airway (NPA)
description: Shigar da madaidaicin hanyar iska ta hanci mai sassauƙa don kula da patency na iska a cikin mara lafiya marar hankali ko mara hankali.
steps: Zaɓi girman NPA mai dacewa (auna daga hanci zuwa kunnuwa).
Lubricate NPA da karimci da mai mai mai narkewa ko gishiri.
Saka fil ɗin aminci ta cikin flange idan ba a rigaya ba (yana hana buri).
Saka a hankali a cikin hancin dama (bevel zuwa septum), yana ci gaba a layi daya zuwa ga baki.
Ci gaba har sai flange ya tsaya a kan hanci.
Mayar da majiyyaci (matsayin farfadowa idan babu damuwa na kashin baya) kuma sake tantance hanyar iska.
Idan juriya ta hadu, gwada hancin hagu.
warnings: An haramta shi a cikin raunin da ake zargin basilar kwanyar (idanun raccoon, alamar yaƙi, rhinorrhea CSF).
NPA shine mafi kyawun haɗin hanyar iska na farko na mara lafiya -- OPA na iya haifar da amai a cikin marasa lafiya da basu san komai ba.
